nasb.text: You shall therefore obey the Lord your God, and do His commandments and His statutes which I command you today.”

esv.text: You shall therefore obey the voice of the Lord your God, keeping his commandments and his statutes, which I command you today.”

cnv.text: 所以你要聽從耶和華你的　神的話，遵行他的誡命和律例，就是我今日吩咐你的。”

ccb.text: 你们要听从祂，遵守祂今天借我吩咐你们的诫命和律例。”
